summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Products page redesign and Checkout country codes expansion. All features working excellently with 100% backend API success and full frontend functionality verified.
passed_tests: Products page loads with complete header (logo, search, wishlist, cart, user icons)
CategoriesNav properly integrated on products page
Category quick filter pills with 'الكل' active by default (34 filter buttons found)
Products grid displays in 4-column desktop, 2-column mobile layout
Products have square aspect-ratio images as required
Full footer with logo, quick links, payment methods, trust indicator
Mobile responsiveness verified for products page
Checkout page country dropdown has 107 countries (exceeds 90+ requirement)
Checkout loads correctly with items in cart
Product detail page /products/ramlogo working with YouTube video and customizations
Category page displays products correctly (12 products in test category)
Homepage loads correctly with all components
